Cristiano Ronaldo said “I want to win the Champions League with Juve - we will focus on that but without obsession, step after step, and then we'll see: whether this year, next year or the year after.”
He then added that “The goal for the club is to win the championship, the Italian Cup and of course do our best in the Champions League.”

2
“I hope I can help Juventus win it (the Champions League). They couldn’t win (last year) because even when you get to the final nothing is written. I hope I can be the lucky star of this club but we will see what happens.”
